summary: Dashboard & Pricing Rework (Phase 39) testing complete: Backend 12/12 tests passed (100%). Frontend E2E verified all key features - dashboard widgets, pricing page, share functionality. Two design issues found in pricing page.

issues: Elite price shown as £99/mo in comparison table header but £79/mo on pricing cards - INCONSISTENT
Starter column missing from feature comparison table - only shows Free/Pro/Elite

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/auth/login works with admin credentials
Backend: GET /api/auth/profile returns user with plan and admin status
Backend: GET /api/stripe/plans returns 4 tiers (Free, Starter, Pro, Elite)
Backend: Plans have correct GBP pricing (Free=£0, Starter=£19, Pro=£39, Elite=£79)
Backend: Each plan has features object
Backend: GET /api/stripe/feature-access returns correct flags for admin/elite user
Backend: Admin user correctly shows elite plan with all features enabled
Backend: GET /api/products returns products with trend_score, early_trend_score, etc.
Backend: Products have launch score fields for TrendScout Radar
Backend: WhileYouWereAway data available (exploding/emerging/high margin counts)
Backend: TrendScout Radar data available with win_score calculation
Backend: API health check passed
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with product recommendation card
Frontend: Login page loads and accepts credentials
Frontend: Dashboard loads with WhileYouWereAway widget (1 Exploding, 38 Emerging, 30 High Margin)
Frontend: AI Co-pilot hero section displayed
Frontend: TrendScout Radar shows products with Launch Score, margin, share button, Analyze button
Frontend: Share button opens ShareableProductCard modal with Download Image, Copy Link, Share buttons
Frontend: MissedOpportunities widget correctly NOT shown for elite user
Frontend: Daily Opportunities panel with Emerging/Strong Launch/Trend Spikes tabs
Frontend: Opportunity Radar shows products with Ad Activity scores
Frontend: Your Stores section with Create Your First Store button
Frontend: Simple/Advanced view mode toggle works
Frontend: Intelligence Dashboard shown in Advanced mode with 5 tabs (Feed, Winners, Radar, Watchlist, Alerts)
Frontend: Live Opportunity Feed shows real-time product signals
Frontend: Pricing page shows 4 tiers with correct GBP pricing on cards
Frontend: Pro plan marked as 'Most Popular'
Frontend: Feature comparison table present
Frontend: Sidebar navigation includes all expected links (Dashboard, Discover, Reports, My Stores, etc.)
Frontend: ELITE FEATURES section in sidebar shows Trend Alerts (16)
action_items: Fix PricingPage.jsx line 369: Change Elite £99/mo to £79/mo in comparison table header
Consider adding Starter column to feature comparison table for complete 4-tier view
critical_code_review_comments: PricingPage.jsx:369 - Hardcoded Elite price '£99/mo' inconsistent with actual £79/mo pricing
Feature comparison table missing Starter tier - users may not see starter-specific features
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin user and product data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard & Pricing rework verified. All widgets functioning. Key features: WhileYouWereAway shows detection counts, TrendScout Radar shows top products with Launch Score and share functionality, ShareableProductCard modal works with html2canvas export, MissedOpportunities correctly hidden for elite users, Intelligence Dashboard visible in Advanced mode. Pricing page has minor design issue (£99 vs £79 for Elite in table header). Budget Optimizer widget not visible because no active tests exist (expected behavior - it returns null when total_active_tests=0).

WhileYouWereAway.shows: 1 Exploding Trends, 38 Emerging Products, 30 High Margin Opportunities

TrendScoutRadar.shows: Top products with Launch Score, share button, Analyze button, margin info

ShareableProductCard.features: Download Image, Copy Link, Share buttons, html2canvas export

AIcoPilot.shows: Find Me a Winning Product hero section

issues: Table header shows Elite £99/mo instead of £79/mo
Missing Starter column in comparison table

StripeAPIs.plans_endpoint: working - returns 4 tiers with correct GBP pricing
StripeAPIs.feature_access_endpoint: working - returns correct flags for admin/elite
